title: conradina glabra
intro: Conradina glabra, also known as the barestem false indigo, is a perennial plant native to the southeastern United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and its capacity to stimulate the immune system. The health benefits of Conradina glabra include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and aid in wound healing. In herbal preparations, Conradina glabra is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its leaves can be dried or used fresh to make these remedies.
